title: Netanyahu Hopes Strikes on Iran Will Lead to Uprising and Regime Change
summary_full: Israeli attacks have targeted the command centers of Iran’s repressive, internal security forces in hopes that Iranians will overthrow their rulers. Some see that as wishful thinking.
summary_public: Israeli attacks have targeted the command centers of Iran’s repressive, internal security forces in hopes that Iranians will overthrow their rulers. Some see that as wishful thinking.

IL.label: negative
